title: ACHR Stock Gains Altitude as Certification Milestones Pile Up
text: Archer Aviation stock gained altitude May 13 as certification milestones continued accumulating. Company became first eVTOL manufacturer to achieve Phase 3 closure in FAA certification process, marking significant regulatory progress. FAA acceptance of 100% Means of Compliance demonstrated strong regulatory alignment with certification pathway. Stock response positive as market recognized tangible progress toward commercial operations. Key milestones driving momentum include Phase 3 closure, expanded piloted flight testing, infrastructure expansion at Hawthorne Airport, and international regulatory progress in UAE. Phase 4 completion remains critical path item for commercial launch in 2026. CEO commentary emphasized company executing from position of strength with $1.8B liquidity and clear regulatory timeline. Analyst commentary highlighted this represents meaningful de-risking of timeline and certification pathway compared to competitors.
